title: rmi.storageImageID: fix Wrapf format warning
body:
Golang tip got smarter and found the following issue:

    "Wrapf format %v reads arg #2, but call has 1 arg"

Signed-off-by: Valentin Rothberg <vrothberg@suse.com>
